title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Pidilite Industries

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Pidilite Industries
jsonLd.description:
We at Pidilite Industries are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pidilite Industries:
Pidilite Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pidilite Industries!
